Notes: Delete the zone apex by name after establishing that the apex exists. The zone includes an extra apex TXT RR so a server that treats delete_name at the apex as a blanket deletion can differ from one that preserves mandatory SOA/NS or rejects the update.

Steps.Description: Attempt to delete the zone apex name via delete_name after a prerequisite that the apex name is in use.

Steps.Name: campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the apex SOA remains and whether the UPDATE was applied or rejected.

Steps.Name: campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the apex NS rrset remains and whether the UPDATE was applied or rejected.

Steps.Name: campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the extra apex TXT RR was removed, leaving a post-state distinction.
